description: Emergency exits must be clearly marked and unobstructed
visual_signals: exit sign dark or missing above doorway
boxes or furniture blocking path to exit door
exit door chained shut or padlocked

description: Fire extinguishers must be mounted, accessible, and serviced with current inspection tag
visual_signals: fire extinguisher on floor instead of wall mount
inspection tag showing expired annual service date
extinguisher blocked by stored materials or equipment

description: Wet floor hazards must be marked with warning signs
visual_signals: visible water puddle on tile floor with no sign present
wet floor sign knocked over or placed far from spill
glossy wet surface near building entrance without warning cone

description: Electrical panels must be accessible with 36-inch clearance maintained (OSHA 1910.303)
visual_signals: storage boxes stacked directly in front of electrical panel
equipment parked within the 36-inch marked clearance zone
panel door unable to open fully due to adjacent obstruction

description: Smoke detectors must be present, unobstructed, and showing active status indicator
visual_signals: ceiling location with missing smoke detector and visible wiring
smoke detector covered with plastic bag or tape
detector hanging from ceiling with no indicator light visible

description: Emergency lighting must be functional with charged batteries
visual_signals: emergency light unit with no illumination during test
battery backup light showing red fault indicator
broken lens or missing lamp head on emergency light fixture

description: Stairways must have continuous handrails and be free of obstructions
visual_signals: stairwell with boxes or supplies stored on treads
handrail detached from wall or missing mounting brackets
gap in handrail run where section is absent

description: Hazardous materials must be properly labeled with GHS-compliant signage and stored in appropriate containment
visual_signals: chemical container with no label or faded illegible label
hazardous liquid stored without secondary containment tray
SDS binder missing from designated wall station near chemical storage

description: First aid kit must be accessible, properly signed, and stocked
visual_signals: first aid cabinet with empty compartments visible through window
first aid kit sign missing or obscured above station
kit locked without break-glass access or key visible

description: Floor surfaces must be in good repair without cracks, holes, or uneven joints
visual_signals: cracked concrete floor with raised lip creating trip edge
hole in floor surface exposing subfloor or utility space
uneven floor joint with height difference greater than quarter inch

description: HVAC systems must be properly maintained with clean filters and no visible mold growth
visual_signals: dark discoloration or mold visible around air vent diffuser
HVAC filter visibly clogged with dust and debris
condensation dripping from ductwork or ceiling vent

description: Security cameras and access control systems must be operational and unobstructed
visual_signals: security camera with lens aimed at wall or ceiling instead of coverage area
badge reader with cracked screen or dangling wires
camera obscured by plant growth or decorative banner

description: Sprinkler heads must be visible, unobstructed, and maintain 18-inch clearance below deflector (NFPA 25)
visual_signals: stored materials stacked within 18 inches of sprinkler head deflector
sprinkler head painted over or covered with decorative cap
corroded or leaking sprinkler head with visible mineral deposits

description: Sprinkler system control valves must be in the open position and properly supervised
visual_signals: sprinkler control valve handle in closed or partially closed position
valve missing tamper seal or supervisory lock
OS&Y valve stem not extended indicating closed position

description: Fire department connection (FDC) must be accessible, undamaged, and caps in place
visual_signals: FDC siamese connection with missing or broken caps
landscaping or parked vehicle blocking access to FDC
FDC with visible corrosion or damaged threads on couplings

description: Fire alarm pull stations must be accessible, mounted at proper height, and unobstructed (NFPA 72)
visual_signals: pull station obscured behind wall-mounted furniture or signage
pull station mounted higher than 54 inches above floor
pull station with broken handle or missing protective cover

description: Fire doors must self-close completely, latch properly, and not be wedged or propped open
visual_signals: fire-rated door held open with wooden wedge or doorstop
fire door with disconnected or broken self-closing hardware
fire door with gap visible between door edge and frame when closed

description: Fire doors must display visible fire rating label on door edge or hinge side
visual_signals: fire door edge missing the metal fire rating label
painted-over or illegible fire rating tag on door frame
replacement door without UL or WHI certification label

description: Stairwell doors must be self-closing with no storage permitted in stairwells (NFPA 101)
visual_signals: boxes or cleaning supplies stored under stairwell
stairwell door propped open with equipment or trash can
stairwell lacking required floor identification signage

description: Evacuation maps must be posted at designated locations showing routes and assembly points
visual_signals: wall-mounted evacuation map frame empty or map missing
evacuation route map faded or outdated with old floor layout
no visible assembly point signage near building exits

description: Emergency action plan drill records must be current and posted (OSHA 1910.38)
visual_signals: fire drill log with last entry dated more than 12 months ago
empty clipboard at emergency action plan posting location
no posted schedule of upcoming fire or evacuation drills

description: ADA-compliant accessible routes must be clear, properly signed, and maintained (ADA Standards)
visual_signals: wheelchair ramp blocked by furniture or delivery items
accessible route sign missing or not at required height
tactile warning strip at ramp transition missing or damaged

description: ADA door hardware must be operable with one hand without tight grasping or twisting
visual_signals: round doorknob on accessible route instead of lever handle
door closer requiring excessive force to open
push-button automatic door opener non-functional or missing

description: Wheelchair ramp slope must not exceed 1:12 ratio and must have edge protection and handrails
visual_signals: ramp visibly steeper than standard slope with no landing at top
ramp missing edge guard or curb along open side
ramp handrails absent or ending before the full ramp length

description: Elevator inspection certificate must be current and posted in elevator cab
visual_signals: empty certificate frame inside elevator cab
inspection certificate showing expired date in cab frame
elevator cab with no visible inspection documentation

description: Roof access hatches must be secured and restricted access signs posted
visual_signals: roof hatch left open or unlocked without personnel present
no restricted access sign at roof access ladder or doorway
roof access door with broken lock or missing latch hardware

description: Loading dock must have wheel chocks in use and dock leveler in safe condition
visual_signals: trailer at dock without visible wheel chocks behind rear tires
dock leveler plate bent, cracked, or stuck in raised position
gap between dock leveler and trailer bed creating fall hazard

description: Loading dock areas must have safety barriers and fall protection at open dock doors
visual_signals: open dock door with no safety chain or barrier across opening
dock edge without yellow warning stripe or bollards
personnel walking near open dock edge without guardrail

description: Outdoor walkways must be free of ice, debris, potholes, and have adequate lighting
visual_signals: ice sheet on exterior walkway with no salt or sand treatment visible
pothole in pedestrian walkway deeper than half inch
exterior walkway with non-functioning overhead light fixture at night

description: Dumpster and waste enclosure must maintain fire clearance from building and lids must be closed
visual_signals: dumpster positioned directly against exterior building wall
dumpster lid left open with waste overflowing above rim
waste enclosure fence damaged or gate hanging off hinges

description: Mechanical rooms must be locked, properly signed, and free of unrelated storage
visual_signals: mechanical room door propped open without personnel present
no mechanical room identification sign on door
boxes and miscellaneous items stored among mechanical equipment

description: Backflow preventer must have current inspection tag and be accessible for testing
visual_signals: backflow preventer with expired or missing annual test tag
backflow device buried behind stored materials preventing access
backflow preventer showing visible corrosion or dripping from relief port

description: Floor openings must be guarded with standard railings and toeboards or secured covers (OSHA 1910.23)
visual_signals: open floor hole with no cover or guardrail visible
floor opening cover displaced or not secured against movement
floor hatch left open without temporary barricade around perimeter

description: Combustible dust must not be allowed to accumulate on overhead surfaces, ledges, or equipment (NFPA 652)
visual_signals: visible dust layer coating overhead beams and light fixtures
dust accumulation on ductwork and pipe runs above work area
dust buildup on electrical conduit and junction boxes near ceiling

description: Asbestos-containing material must be identified with warning signs and monitored for condition (OSHA 1910.1001)
visual_signals: pipe insulation with frayed or damaged fibrous wrapping and no label
missing asbestos warning sign at entrance to area with known ACM
ceiling tiles or floor tiles with visible crumbling or deterioration in older building

description: Emergency eyewash stations must be unobstructed with current weekly flush tags (ANSI Z358.1)
visual_signals: eyewash station weekly test tag with no recent entries
equipment or storage blocking path to eyewash station
eyewash nozzle covers missing or dust-capped indicating disuse

description: Emergency generator must show adequate fuel level, visible run-hour log, and proper exhaust routing
visual_signals: generator fuel gauge reading below quarter-tank level
run-hour log clipboard missing or last entry months old
generator exhaust pipe terminating near air intake or window

description: Extension cords must not be used as permanent wiring and must be in good condition (OSHA 1910.305)
visual_signals: extension cord routed through wall, ceiling, or doorway as permanent installation
extension cord with damaged insulation exposing bare conductors
multiple extension cords daisy-chained together at power strip

description: Ground fault circuit interrupter (GFCI) outlets must be installed in wet or damp locations
visual_signals: standard outlet without GFCI protection near sink or water source
GFCI outlet with tripped indicator and not reset
missing weatherproof cover on outdoor electrical outlet

description: Portable space heaters must be approved, have tip-over protection, and maintain clearance from combustibles
visual_signals: portable heater positioned directly against cardboard boxes or paper
space heater without visible tip-over safety switch
non-commercial space heater plugged into extension cord

description: Guardrails on elevated platforms and mezzanines must be 42 inches high with mid-rail and toeboard (OSHA 1910.29)
visual_signals: mezzanine edge with guardrail below standard 42-inch height
elevated platform railing missing mid-rail between top rail and floor
guardrail with missing or damaged toeboard allowing objects to slide off edge

description: Means of egress must be illuminated to at least 1 foot-candle at floor level (NFPA 101)
visual_signals: dark corridor in egress path with burned-out overhead lighting
dimly lit stairwell with insufficient lighting to see treads
exit discharge area outside building door with no lighting at night

description: Fire extinguisher must be appropriate type for hazards in area and mounted at proper height
visual_signals: water-type extinguisher mounted near electrical equipment instead of CO2
extinguisher handle mounted higher than 5 feet above floor
extinguisher missing operating instructions label or pressure gauge in red zone

description: Flammable and combustible liquid storage cabinets must be properly labeled, grounded, and self-closing (OSHA 1910.106)
visual_signals: flammable storage cabinet with doors propped open or latches missing
yellow flammable cabinet without visible Flammable warning label
flammable cabinet missing grounding wire connection lug

description: No smoking signs must be posted in prohibited areas and enforced
visual_signals: cigarette butts on ground near building entrance without designated area
no smoking sign missing near flammable storage or fuel dispensing area
ash tray or smoking evidence in non-smoking area
